q: Write the canonical commutation relations for bosonic field operators Psi(r) and Psi-dagger(r') in real space.
Give the single-particle kinetic energy operator T in momentum-space second-quantized notation.
For fermionic creation operators, what is (c^dagger_lambda)^2 for any single-particle state lambda?
Express the real-space fermionic field operator Psi(r) in a box of volume V as a sum over momentum annihilation operators c_k.
What is the anticommutator {c_lambda, c^dagger_mu} for two orthogonal fermionic states lambda != mu?
Write the second-quantized two-particle interaction V(r1,r2) using field operators.
gold: V = (1/2) integral Psi^dag(r) Psi^dag(r') V(r,r') Psi(r') Psi(r) d3r d3r'

q: What is the commutator of the total number operator N with the field creation operator Psi-dagger(r)?
For a bosonic Fock state |N> = (1/sqrt(N!)) (c^dag)^N |0>, evaluate c_lambda |N>.
Under a unitary basis change |beta_bar> = sum_alpha U_{alpha beta} |alpha>, how do creation operators transform?
What is the ground-state energy density of a non-interacting 3D Fermi gas with Fermi momentum k_F?
What is the commutator [n(r), Psi-dagger(r')] where n(r) is the local density operator?
If the Hamiltonian commutes with total momentum P = sum_k hbar k c^dag_k c_k, what property do its eigenstates have?
gold: They can be chosen as simultaneous eigenstates of total momentum, eigenvalue P_tot = sum hbar k_i

q: Write the action of the fermionic hole creation operator h^dag_k on the filled Fermi sea |FS> for k < k_F.
What does Wick's Theorem give for the vacuum expectation value of an odd number of creation/annihilation operators?
Write the Jordan-Wigner transformation mapping a spin-1/2 raising operator S_i^+ on a 1D chain to spinless fermions.
gold: S_i^+ = c^dag_i exp(i pi sum_{j<i} c^dag_j c_j)
